zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Grey於1315年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，她的父親Sir Thomas Grey I30歲，母親Agnes de Beyle26歲。她於1328年與William Heron I在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她於1314年住在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德。她去世於1367年在英國諾圖波藍德艾德林加姆享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Grey于1315年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Grey I30岁，母亲Agnes de Beyle26岁。她于1328年与William Heron I在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她于1314年住在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德。她去世于1367年在英国諾圖波藍德艾德林加姆享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Grey was born in 1315, in Northumberland, England, her father, Sir Thomas Grey I, was 30 and her mother, Agnes de Beyle, was 26. She married William Heron I in 1328, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She lived in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom in 1314. She died in 1367, in Edlingham, Northumberland, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Grey est née en 1315, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Grey I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Beyle, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William Heron I en 1328, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle a vécu à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1314. Elle est décédée en 1367, à Edlingham, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Grey 1315 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Grey I 30 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Beyle 26. Sie hat 1328 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom William Heron I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1314 hat sie in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb 1367 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Edlingham, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Grey è nata il nel 1315 nel Northumberland, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Grey I, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Beyle, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William Heron I nel 1328, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1314. Morì nel 1367, nel Edlingham, Northumberland, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Greyが1315年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Grey Iは30歳，母Agnes de Beyleは26歳であった。1328年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでWilliam Heron Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1314年にはイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドに住んでいた。彼女は1367年にイギリスノースウンバーランドエドリンガムで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Grey(이)가 1315년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Grey I(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Beyle(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1328년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 William Heron I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1314년도에 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 살았다. 그녀는 1367년 영국 노르스벌랜드 에들링함에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Grey nasceu em 1315, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Grey I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Beyle, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William Heron I em 1328, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela viveu em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1314. Ela faleceu em 1367, em Edlingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Grey родилась в 1315 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Grey I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Beyle, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Heron I в 1328 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она жила в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в 1314 году. Она умерла в 1367 г. в местности эдлингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Grey nació en 1315, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Grey I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes de Beyle, tenía 26 años. Se casó con William Heron I en 1328, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1314. Murió en 1367, en Edlingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
